worktree_state.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
  "id": "campaign",
  "name": "Campaign Module",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "status": "stub",
  "description": "Kampanya yönetimi - promosyonlar, indirimler ve özel teklifler",

  "type": "feature",
  "category": "marketing",

  "author": {
    "name": "E-Menum Team",
    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
  },

  "compatibility": {
    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },

  "dependencies": {
    "modules": ["auth", "organization", "menu", "order"],
    "optional": ["notification", "analytics", "loyalty"]
  },

  "provides": {
    "services": ["ICampaignService", "IDiscountService"],
    "events": [
      "campaign.created",
      "campaign.activated",
      "campaign.deactivated",
      "campaign.expired",
      "discount.applied",
      "discount.redeemed"
    ],
    "hooks": [
      "beforeOrderTotal",
      "afterOrderCreated"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "campaign:read",
      "campaign:create",
      "campaign:update",
      "campaign:delete",
      "campaign:activate"
    ]
  },

  "tier": {
    "minimum": "starter",
    "features": {
      "starter": ["basic_discounts", "promo_codes"],
      "professional": ["basic_discounts", "promo_codes", "time_limited", "category_discounts"],
      "business": ["basic_discounts", "promo_codes", "time_limited", "category_discounts", "bundle_deals", "happy_hour"],
      "enterprise": ["basic_discounts", "promo_codes", "time_limited", "category_discounts", "bundle_deals", "happy_hour", "personalized", "ab_testing"]
    }
  },

  "plannedFeatures": [
    "Percentage discounts",
    "Fixed amount discounts",
    "Promo codes",
    "Time-limited offers",
    "Happy hour pricing",
    "Bundle deals",
    "Buy X Get Y free",
    "Category-wide discounts",
    "Customer segment targeting",
    "A/B testing for campaigns"
  ],

  "estimatedRelease": "Q2 2026"
}
